_comment: Each person adds this to their own MCP client config. CAMBIUM_AGENT_ID must be unique per person; CAMBIUM_REPO points at their own clone of the shared project. CAMBIUM_ORG_REPO (optional) points at their clone of the dedicated org knowledge repo — required only to read/write org scope.

env._optional: defaults shown below; omit unless you need to change them
env._org: org scope: a dedicated knowledge repo everyone clones
